Text[0]: Glamours allow you to alter the appearance of equipment through the use of illusory magicks. To change the appearance of an item, highlight it and select <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Cast Glamour<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> from the subcommands.

Glamours allow you to alter the appearance of equipment through the use of illusory magicks. To change the appearance of an item, highlight it and select <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Cast Glamour<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> from the subcommands. The illusion will take effect even if the projected gear differs from the class or level of the base equipment.

Casting glamours requires catalysts known as <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>glamour prisms<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. Please note that, for the illusion to take effect, the projected gear must be compatible with the glamoured gear's level, class, race, and gender.

Casting glamours requires catalysts known as <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>glamour prisms<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. Separate catalysts known as <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>glamour dispellers<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> can return glamoured items to their original appearance.
